OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: STIX entity types imported by the connector.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

RANSOMLOOK_API_KEY.description: Optional API key sent in the Authorization header.

RANSOMLOOK_INITIAL_HISTORY_DAYS.description: Lookback used on the first connector run.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_RESPONSE_SIZE_MB.description: Maximum accepted size of one RansomLook API response in MiB.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_RECORDS_PER_ENDPOINT.description: Maximum top-level records accepted from one endpoint or collection, and nested torrent context values retained per group.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_PAGES_PER_ENDPOINT.description: Maximum pages requested from a paginated endpoint per run.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_REQUESTS_PER_RUN.description: Maximum physical RansomLook HTTP attempts in one run.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_RUN_DURATION_SECONDS.description: Wall-clock deadline shared by all RansomLook requests in a run.

RANSOMLOOK_WORK_RECONCILIATION_TIMEOUT_S.description: Maximum time to wait for OpenCTI workers to complete one logical delivery before retaining its cursor for replay.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_OBJECTS_PER_BUNDLE.description: Maximum STIX objects in one dependency-complete input bundle.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_OBJECTS_PER_RUN.description: Maximum STIX objects accumulated during one connector run before undelivered claims are retained for retry.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_BUNDLE_SIZE_MB.description: Maximum serialized size of one dependency-complete input bundle in MiB before queue transport; must cover configured post evidence.

RANSOMLOOK_REPLAY_WINDOW_DAYS.description: Days replayed before the claims cursor to collect late posts.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_ARTIFACT_SIZE_MB.description: Maximum decoded size of one screenshot or source Artifact in MiB.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_ARTIFACTS_PER_CLAIM.description: Maximum evidence Artifacts decoded for one victim claim.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_ARTIFACTS_PER_LOCATION.description: Maximum evidence Artifacts decoded for one actor location.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_ARTIFACTS_PER_RUN.description: Maximum evidence Artifacts decoded during one connector run.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_ARTIFACT_BYTES_PER_RUN_MB.description: Maximum total decoded evidence bytes per run, in MiB.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_EVIDENCE_SERIALIZED_BYTES.description: Maximum aggregate base64 evidence bytes retained across Artifacts and Report files during one run, in MiB.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_PENDING_CLAIMS.description: Maximum incomplete claim records retained for bounded retry.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_CLAIM_RETRIES.description: Maximum retry attempts for incomplete claim detail or evidence.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_PENDING_GROUPS.description: Maximum actor-profile groups retained for bounded retry.

RANSOMLOOK_MAX_ENRICHMENT_RETRIES.description: Maximum retry attempts for transient actor-profile enrichment.

RANSOMLOOK_RETRY_MAX_AGE_DAYS.description: Maximum age of claim and enrichment retry work.

RANSOMLOOK_ENRICH_ACTOR_PROFILES.description: Enrich profiles for groups encountered in the claims window.

RANSOMLOOK_IMPORT_INFRASTRUCTURE.description: Import typed actor infrastructure for encountered groups.

RANSOMLOOK_IMPORT_SENSITIVE_INFRASTRUCTU.description: Import private, chat, admin, and file-server location values.

RANSOMLOOK_IMPORT_POST_EVIDENCE.description: Import bounded screenshot and HTML evidence attached to claims.

RANSOMLOOK_IMPORT_LOCATION_EVIDENCE.description: Import bounded captures attached to actor infrastructure.

RANSOMLOOK_IMPORT_NOTES.description: Import ransom notes associated with encountered groups.

RANSOMLOOK_IMPORT_WALLETS.description: Import cryptocurrency wallets associated with encountered groups.

RANSOMLOOK_IMPORT_TORRENTS.description: Import bounded torrent and magnet intelligence.

RANSOMLOOK_IMPORT_TORRENT_PEERS.description: Import torrent peer telemetry as context; never as Indicators.

RANSOMLOOK_IMPORT_ANALYSES.description: Import explicit technical analyses, malware, and TTP mappings.

RANSOMLOOK_IMPORT_VICTIM_WEBSITES.description: Import victim website observables as non-malicious context.

RANSOMLOOK_CREATE_INDICATORS.description: Create Indicators only for explicit upstream malicious assertions.
